message:
fix(tests): load beads JSONL at runtime instead of compile-time include_str!

The CI verification profile tests used include_str! to embed
.beads/issues.jsonl at compile time, which meant the test binary was
tightly coupled to the exact file state at build time and could fail
to compile if the JSONL was malformed or being concurrently modified
by other agents.

Changed known_bead_ids() to load the file at runtime via
std::fs::read_to_string, returning Option<BTreeSet<String>> so callers
can gracefully skip bead-link validation when the file is absent.

Also simplified record_failure's SystemTime unwrap from
.map(|d| d.as_secs()).unwrap_or(0) to the more idiomatic .map_or(0, ...).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
